mentions.lyric: That's why they call me Young Money LeBron James we ballin'
Call me Kobe Bryant cause I'm ballin' every night
I'm catchin' bodies like Shaq catch alley-oops
Flow butter smooth like Iverson crossover
Got K.D. numbers scoring every night
I'm a champion Wade in the fourth I just take over
CP3 vision I see plays before they happen
KG intensity heart of a warrior in the paint
Shooting like Curry everything I touch is golden
Kyrie handles I'm dribbling through the doubt
Ja Morant altitude I'm always rising above
Russ triple doubles don't mean nothing when you lose
I score like Melo 30 a night is the minimum
Cold like Pierce in the fourth when it matters most
Dirk range I'm shooting threes from half court easy
Pure as Ray Allen from three never miss a stroke
Mr. Big Shot cold like Billups in the clutch
PG-13 energy going hard every single night
Quiet as Kawhi the claw comes out when it counts
The Process Embiid I trust nobody but myself
KAT range big man shooting threes like a guard
Ben Simmons won't shoot I'm taking every shot myself
Zo passing I keep the offense flowing never forcing
Book scoring 70 they said he couldn't but he did
Beal buckets every night never gets the credit he deserves
Kemba crossover deadly from the elbow I just pull up

mentions.song: One Man Can Change the World
mentions.lyric: Drummond boards pulling everything down like gravity
Round Mound of Rebound Barkley I'm taking everything inside
Cold as Reggie Miller from three in your face no fear
Stockton to Malone I run my plays precise every time
Mailman delivers every night like Malone never late
Grant Hill grace and skill the total package on the floor
Penny smooth with the handle going coast to coast no problem
KJ fast as lightning through the lane nobody catches him
Admiral Robinson standing tall in the paint since day one
Sprewell temper I'll choke out anybody who gets in my way
GP on the court I talk trash and back it up every time
Small as Muggsy but I move the ball better than anyone
Van Exel pull-up I hit the long two with no hesitation
Kobe mentality mamba mode I never stop attacking
Rose MVP pace the youngest ever and still going hard
PG shooting under pressure I trust the process every time
Oladipo bounce back earned every point the hard way
Tatum rising star Boston wants a champion and he's the one
Middleton quiet assassin drops 40 and nobody saw it coming
VanVleet undrafted they told him no but he never listened
Morant flying I don't need a runway just the lane
KG intensity I go hard every single possession no days off
Duncan consistency night in night out you know what you getting
AI crossover I leave defenders on the floor reaching for air
Curry range I shoot from places that shouldn't even count
